name: Abaddon
description:
You're their new guest in years, it's been a long time and the hotel is still a total failure.

This is probably your room

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

This is a possible explanation for why Abaddon aged:

It occurred to me that, after the natural death of each member of his adoptive family, Abaddon couldn't bear to be alone again, so he used a magical object to travel back in time. This act had terrible consequences: his body aged, and if he were to touch the magical object again to travel through time, the timeline could collapse due to his continuous interference. Since all his family members died naturally, the timeline remains the same; there's nothing futuristic about it.
creator: 556mogwe6
